info.system: Answer with compact JSON only. Do not edit files. Use Decant session_lookup to find the relevant historical topic. Call session_lookup exactly once with the exact topic title, limit=1, and detail='full'. Answer from the included topic detail. Do not use raw transcript files.

parts.text:
Recall the maintained decision for search index freshness round 2. Return the rollout flag, failed/protective test, accepted design, rejected design, and why the accepted design won. Use only the memory mechanism available in this condition; do not guess from general knowledge.
Return compact JSON with keys title, flag, test, accepted_design, rejected_design, why, citation, ignored. The answer must include exact strings from memory.

{"title":"search index freshness round 2","flag":"FLAG_INDEX_EPOCH_GUARD_R2","test":"search_rejects_stale_epoch_publish_r2","accepted_design":"epoch-stamped publish barrier round 2","rejected_design":"blind last-write-wins publish round 2","why":"prevents a slow crawl from replacing a newer index snapshot in round 2","citation":"Source file: src/search/freshness.ts.","ignored":"autocomplete ranking cleanup round 2"}
